title: Raccoon Removal in Somers, NY | $900–$4,000
metaDescription: Professional raccoon removal in Somers, NY. Humane trapping, exclusion, and damage repair. Serving Westchester County homes and businesses. Call today for a free estimate!
intro: Raccoons are a common nuisance in Somers, NY, where wooded properties and rural settings provide ideal habitats for these intelligent creatures. From attic invasions to overturned garbage cans, raccoons can cause significant property damage and health risks. Best Pest Control NYC offers comprehensive raccoon removal services throughout Somers and Westchester County, with pricing typically ranging from $900 to $4,000 depending on the severity of the infestation.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over a decade of wildlife control experience to Somers residents, combining humane trapping methods with permanent exclusion solutions. Our licensed technicians understand Westchester's unique wildlife challenges and provide same-day emergency service throughout the Somers area.
localContext: Somers' proximity to the Muscoot Reservoir, Lasdon Park, and heavily wooded residential areas makes it particularly susceptible to raccoon activity, especially in neighborhoods with older homes featuring accessible chimneys and roof vents. Properties near Route 202 and Primrose Street frequently experience raccoon encounters during spring breeding season and fall when animals seek warm winter shelter.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in Somers, NY?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in Somers typically costs between $900 and $4,000, depending on factors like the number of raccoons, location of the nest (attic, chimney, crawlspace), extent of damage, and necessary exclusion work. A single raccoon removal with basic exclusion may cost $900–$1,500, while a mother with babies requiring extensive repairs can reach $3,000–$4,000.

faqs.question: Are raccoons common in Somers, Westchester County?
faqs.answer: Yes, raccoons are very common in Somers due to the area's abundant woodlands, water sources like Muscoot Reservoir, and mix of rural and suburban properties. Raccoons are attracted to accessible food sources, unsecured garbage, pet food, and easy entry points in attics and chimneys, making Somers homes prime targets for infestation.

faqs.question: What are signs of raccoons in my Somers home?
faqs.answer: Common signs include loud thumping or scratching noises in the attic at night, tipped-over garbage cans, visible paw prints, strong odors from urine or feces, damaged roof vents or soffits, and raccoon droppings (similar to dog feces) around your property. You may also hear vocal chittering or purring sounds, especially during baby season in spring.

faqs.question: Is raccoon removal in Somers humane and legal?
faqs.answer: Yes, Best Pest Control NYC follows all New York State Department of Environmental Conservation regulations for humane wildlife removal. We use live traps and exclusion methods that safely remove raccoons without harm, and we never separate mothers from dependent babies. All relocation and exclusion practices comply with Westchester County and NYS wildlife laws.
